- Please do not report an issue for a version of `seo-kit-bundle` that is no longer supported.

- You can retrieve `seo-kit-bundle` version by running `composer info | grep "seo-kit-bundle"`.
- You can retrieve PHP version by running `php -v`.

- Please remove this comment before submitting your issue.
